title: NeoEcoBridge
description: A hybrid plugin made to bridge economies between Pixelmon and Vault.
body:
**NeoEcoBridge** is an economy bridging plugin for Pixelmon that causes Pixelmon to use Vault's registered economy. Created due to memory leaks and issues with other economy bridging plugins, NeoEcoBridge promises to deliver high-performance. This is a plugin meant for you to be able to drop into your plugins folder and forget about.

### NeoEcoBridge explicitly supports specific hybrid platforms:
- Arclight 1.16.5
- Arclight 1.20.2
- Mohist 1.20.2
- Other hybrids are un-tested, but may work.

### NeoEcoBridge also explicitly supports specific economy plugins:
- EssentialsX
- CMI

If an economy plugin is not explicitly supported, it does not mean it will not work. Explicitly supported economy plugins exist due to those plugins not using Vault's API completely. If a supported plugin is not found, NeoEcoBridge attempts to wrap vault's registered economy, but this may not always work. If an economy plugin needs explicit support, reach out to me in my discord at the bottom of this post. If you're a dev, there's API to add more explicit economy plugins externally.

### To install, drag-and-drop the downloaded jar into your /plugins/ folder.

NeoEcoBridge does include a single config option, "show-decimals". This config option is used to control whether or not players can see decimals in their balance in the inventory. Default false. "/neoecobridge reload" will reload this single value. The permission "neoecobridge.reload" is required to run the command in-game.
